errors.description: No live remote challenge has been issued or accepted.
Challenge exists but has not produced a verified response.
Live challenge-response signature, policy binding, device binding, freshness, and nonce checks passed.
Live challenge response signature or packet state is invalid.
Live challenge validity window has expired or is not yet current.
Live challenge response nonce has already been observed.
Live challenge packet or issued challenge reference is missing.
Live challenge packet is missing required bounded fields or contains malformed metadata.
Live challenge response is not bound to the expected device identity fingerprint.
Live challenge response is not bound to the expected policy hash.
Live challenge response signature is missing, invalid, or not signed by the trusted device key.
Live challenge response cannot be verified because the device public key is untrusted.
Live remote challenge-response attestation failed closed.
